name: Ruy Lopez
description: A classical opening focused on long-term pressure and positional play.

name: Italian Game
description: A classical opening built around development, center control, and quick kingside pressure.

name: Four Knights Game
description: A simple and logical opening where both sides develop naturally.
movesPreview: 1. e4 e5 2. Nf3 Nc6 3. Nc3 Nf6

name: Scotch Game
description: A direct opening that opens the center early and leads to active piece play.

name: London System
description: A reliable setup-based opening with simple development and a clear plan.

name: Queen's Gambit
description: One of the most important openings in chess, built around central tension and long-term pressure.

name: Queen's Gambit Declined
description: A solid black response to the Queen's Gambit, built around e6 and central stability.

name: Catalan Opening
description: A positional opening combining Queen's Gambit ideas with a kingside fianchetto.

name: English Opening
description: A flexible flank opening that often transposes into many different structures.

name: Sicilian Defense
description: Black's most combative response to 1.e4, aiming for imbalance and counterplay.

name: Sicilian Defense (Dragon Variation)
description: A sharp Sicilian where Black fianchettos the bishop and often launches kingside counterplay.
movesPreview: 1. e4 c5 2. Nf3 d6 3. d4 cxd4 4. Nxd4 Nf6 5. Nc3 g6

name: Najdorf Sicilian
description: One of the richest and most theoretical openings in all of chess.
movesPreview: 1. e4 c5 2. Nf3 d6 3. d4 cxd4 4. Nxd4 Nf6 5. Nc3 a6

name: Caro-Kann
description: A dependable black defense with a strong pawn structure and solid plans.

name: French Defense
description: A resilient black defense that challenges the center from a distance.

name: Pirc Defense
description: A flexible hypermodern defense where Black lets White build a center and attacks it later.
movesPreview: 1. e4 d6 2. d4 Nf6 3. Nc3 g6

name: King's Indian Defense
description: A dynamic opening where Black allows White space and then counterattacks aggressively.
movesPreview: 1. d4 Nf6 2. c4 g6 3. Nc3 Bg7

name: Grunfeld Defense
description: A dynamic defense based on pressure against White's center.
movesPreview: 1. d4 Nf6 2. c4 g6 3. Nc3 d5

name: Nimzo-Indian Defense
description: A highly respected defense with deep strategic ideas and flexible pawn structures.
movesPreview: 1. d4 Nf6 2. c4 e6 3. Nc3 Bb4
